title: aipack MCP Server Definition
description: Schema for pack mcp/*.json files. Each file declares one MCP server connection. The filename (minus .json) must match the name field (case-insensitive). See docs/pack-format.md Section 6.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

name.description: Server identifier. Must match the filename (minus .json) and the corresponding key in pack.json mcp.servers (case-insensitive after trim). Mismatch causes silent invisibility during sync.

transport.description: MCP transport protocol. Determines which connection fields are required.

timeout.description: Connection timeout in seconds. Transformed to harness-native units at sync time (e.g., milliseconds for OpenCode).

command.description: Command and arguments to launch the server process. Required for stdio transport. Supports {env:VAR} and {params.KEY} placeholders.

env.description: Environment variables passed to the server process (stdio transport). Supports {env:VAR} and {params.KEY} placeholders.

url.description: Server endpoint URL. Required for sse and streamable-http transports. Supports {env:VAR} and {params.KEY} placeholders.

headers.description: HTTP headers sent with requests (sse and streamable-http transports). Supports {env:VAR} and {params.KEY} placeholders.

available_tools.description: Complete inventory of tools the server provides. Used for tool permission rendering — tools in this list but not in default_allowed_tools (pack.json) or allowed_tools (profile) are explicitly denied where the harness supports it.

links.description: Documentation URLs. Metadata only — not synced to harness config.

auth.description: Authentication notes (e.g., required tokens, setup steps). Metadata only — not synced to harness config.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about the server. Metadata only — not synced to harness config.
